confirmDeleteStreamAndCamera: Delete stream "%s" on Flussonic and remove the camera from the system? This cannot be undone.
streamAndCameraDeleted: Media server stream and camera were removed.
noDeleteStreamAndCameraApi: No permission to delete stream with camera (mediaserver / deleteStreamAndCamera, POST).
noAccess: No access to media server API.
confirmDelete: Delete stream "%s" on the media server?
addCameraStreamTitle: New camera and media server stream
cameraStreamCreated: Camera saved: DVR (HLS) and embed are filled automatically; the Flussonic stream uses the name from «Stream name on media server».
cameraCreatedFlussonicFailed: Camera saved and player URLs written, but Flussonic rejected the stream. You can retry later (same cameraId).
applyUrlsFailed: Camera was saved but HLS/DVR field and embed could not be written. Check permissions and camera data.
needAddressesCameras: The addresses module with cameras is required.
noCameraStreamApi: No permission to create camera with stream (mediaserver / cameraStream, POST).
dvrRetentionDaysInvalid: Enter retention as a whole number of days from 1 to 3660.
rtspRequiredForMediaserver: Enter camera RTSP and a unique media-server stream name — RTSP is the source; the name defines the stream URL on the server; HLS DVR is filled automatically.
dvrStreamOptionalHint: Leave empty if you like: after publish, HLS from the media server is saved here.
mediaserverStreamNameHint: Latin letters, digits, dot, dash and underscore; as in the player URL, e.g. Lug_1_2. Not taken from RTSP.
mediaserverStreamNameRequired: Enter the media server stream name.
mediaserverStreamNameInvalid: Stream name: start with a letter or digit, then letters, digits, «_», «-», «.» (max 200 characters).
editStreamHint: The media server name defines the Flussonic stream; if you rename it, the old stream is removed. RTSP is the source; HLS and embed in the card refresh automatically.
streamUpdateOk: Flussonic stream and camera URLs are updated.
streamUpdateFlussonicFailed: The camera card was saved, but Flussonic rejected the stream configuration. Check the RTSP URL and server response.
noUpdateCameraStreamApi: No permission to update stream (mediaserver / updateCameraStream, POST).
needCamerasListForEdit: Cameras list access (cameras / cameras, GET) is required to load the current RTSP.
cameraNotFoundForEdit: Camera not found for this id.
